  • lib
  • Target

AMDGPUSubtarget.h
Go to the documentation of this file.
1//=====-- AMDGPUSubtarget.h - Define Subtarget for the AMDIL ---*- C++ -*-====//
2//
3// The LLVM Compiler Infrastructure
4//
5// This file is distributed under the University of Illinois Open Source
6// License. See LICENSE.TXT for details.
7//
8//==-----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
9//
10/// \file
11/// \brief AMDGPU specific subclass of TargetSubtarget.
12//
13//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
14
15#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_AMDGPUSUBTARGET_H
16#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_R600_AMDGPUSUBTARGET_H
17#include "AMDGPU.h"
18#include "AMDGPUFrameLowering.h"
19#include "AMDGPUInstrInfo.h"
20#include "AMDGPUIntrinsicInfo.h"
21#include "AMDGPUSubtarget.h"
22#include "R600ISelLowering.h"
23#include "llvm/ADT/StringExtras.h"
24#include "llvm/ADT/StringRef.h"
25#include "llvm/IR/DataLayout.h"
26#include "llvm/Target/TargetSubtargetInfo.h"
27
28#define GET_SUBTARGETINFO_HEADER
29#include "AMDGPUGenSubtargetInfo.inc"
30
31namespace llvm {
32
33class SIMachineFunctionInfo;
34
35class AMDGPUSubtarget : public AMDGPUGenSubtargetInfo {
36
37public:
38 enum Generation {
39 R600 = 0,
40 R700,
41 EVERGREEN,
42 NORTHERN_ISLANDS,
43 SOUTHERN_ISLANDS,
44 SEA_ISLANDS,
45 VOLCANIC_ISLANDS,
46 };
47
48 enum {
49 FIXED_SGPR_COUNT_FOR_INIT_BUG = 80
50 };
51
52private:
53 std::string DevName;
54 bool Is64bit;
55 bool DumpCode;
56 bool R600ALUInst;
57 bool HasVertexCache;
58 short TexVTXClauseSize;
59 Generation Gen;
60 bool FP64;
61 bool FP64Denormals;
62 bool FP32Denormals;
63 bool CaymanISA;
64 bool FlatAddressSpace;
65 bool EnableIRStructurizer;
66 bool EnablePromoteAlloca;
67 bool EnableIfCvt;
68 bool EnableLoadStoreOpt;
69 unsigned WavefrontSize;
70 bool CFALUBug;
71 int LocalMemorySize;
72 bool EnableVGPRSpilling;
73 bool SGPRInitBug;
74 int LDSBankCount;
75
76 const DataLayout DL;
77 AMDGPUFrameLowering FrameLowering;
78 std::unique_ptr<AMDGPUTargetLowering> TLInfo;
79 std::unique_ptr<AMDGPUInstrInfo> InstrInfo;
80 InstrItineraryData InstrItins;
81 Triple TargetTriple;
82
83public:
84 AMDGPUSubtarget(StringRef TT, StringRef CPU, StringRef FS, TargetMachine &TM);
85 AMDGPUSubtarget &initializeSubtargetDependencies(StringRef GPU, StringRef FS);
86
87 const AMDGPUFrameLowering *getFrameLowering() const override {
88 return &FrameLowering;
89 }
90 const AMDGPUInstrInfo *getInstrInfo() const override {
91 return InstrInfo.get();
92 }
93 const AMDGPURegisterInfo *getRegisterInfo() const override {
94 return &InstrInfo->getRegisterInfo();
95 }
96 AMDGPUTargetLowering *getTargetLowering() const override {
97 return TLInfo.get();
98 }
99 const DataLayout *getDataLayout() const override { return &DL; }
100 const InstrItineraryData *getInstrItineraryData() const override {
101 return &InstrItins;
102 }
103
104 void ParseSubtargetFeatures(StringRef CPU, StringRef FS);
105
106 bool is64bit() const {
107 return Is64bit;
108 }
109
110 bool hasVertexCache() const {
111 return HasVertexCache;
112 }
113
114 short getTexVTXClauseSize() const {
115 return TexVTXClauseSize;
116 }
117
118 Generation getGeneration() const {
119 return Gen;
120 }
121
122 bool hasHWFP64() const {
123 return FP64;
124 }
125
126 bool hasCaymanISA() const {
127 return CaymanISA;
128 }
129
130 bool hasFP32Denormals() const {
131 return FP32Denormals;
132 }
133
134 bool hasFP64Denormals() const {
135 return FP64Denormals;
136 }
137
138 bool hasFlatAddressSpace() const {
139 return FlatAddressSpace;
140 }
141
142 bool hasBFE() const {
143 return (getGeneration() >= EVERGREEN);
144 }
145
146 bool hasBFI() const {
147 return (getGeneration() >= EVERGREEN);
148 }
149
150 bool hasBFM() const {
151 return hasBFE();
152 }
153
154 bool hasBCNT(unsigned Size) const {
155 if (Size == 32)
156 return (getGeneration() >= EVERGREEN);
157
158 if (Size == 64)
159 return (getGeneration() >= SOUTHERN_ISLANDS);
160
161 return false;
162 }
163
164 bool hasMulU24() const {
165 return (getGeneration() >= EVERGREEN);
166 }
167
168 bool hasMulI24() const {
169 return (getGeneration() >= SOUTHERN_ISLANDS ||
170 hasCaymanISA());
171 }
172
173 bool hasFFBL() const {
174 return (getGeneration() >= EVERGREEN);
175 }
176
177 bool hasFFBH() const {
178 return (getGeneration() >= EVERGREEN);
179 }
180
181 bool IsIRStructurizerEnabled() const {
182 return EnableIRStructurizer;
183 }
184
185 bool isPromoteAllocaEnabled() const {
186 return EnablePromoteAlloca;
187 }
188
189 bool isIfCvtEnabled() const {
190 return EnableIfCvt;
191 }
192
193 bool loadStoreOptEnabled() const {
194 return EnableLoadStoreOpt;
195 }
196
197 unsigned getWavefrontSize() const {
198 return WavefrontSize;
199 }
200
201 unsigned getStackEntrySize() const;
202
203 bool hasCFAluBug() const {
204 assert(getGeneration() <= NORTHERN_ISLANDS);
205 return CFALUBug;
206 }
207
208 int getLocalMemorySize() const {
209 return LocalMemorySize;
210 }
211
212 bool hasSGPRInitBug() const {
213 return SGPRInitBug;
214 }
215
216 int getLDSBankCount() const {
217 return LDSBankCount;
218 }
219
220 unsigned getAmdKernelCodeChipID() const;
221
222 bool enableMachineScheduler() const override {
223 return getGeneration() <= NORTHERN_ISLANDS;
224 }
225
226 void overrideSchedPolicy(MachineSchedPolicy &Policy,
227 MachineInstr *begin, MachineInstr *end,
228 unsigned NumRegionInstrs) const override;
229
230 // Helper functions to simplify if statements
231 bool isTargetELF() const {
232 return false;
233 }
234
235 StringRef getDeviceName() const {
236 return DevName;
237 }
238
239 bool dumpCode() const {
240 return DumpCode;
241 }
242 bool r600ALUEncoding() const {
243 return R600ALUInst;
244 }
245 bool isAmdHsaOS() const {
246 return TargetTriple.getOS() == Triple::AMDHSA;
247 }
248 bool isVGPRSpillingEnabled(const SIMachineFunctionInfo *MFI) const;
249
250 unsigned getMaxWavesPerCU() const {
251 if (getGeneration() >= AMDGPUSubtarget::SOUTHERN_ISLANDS)
252 return 10;
253
254 // FIXME: Not sure what this is for other subtagets.
255 llvm_unreachable("do not know max waves per CU for this subtarget.");
256 }
257};
258
259} // End namespace llvm
260
261#endif
EnableLoadStoreOpt
static cl::opt< bool > EnableLoadStoreOpt("aarch64-load-store-opt", cl::desc("Enable the load/store pair" " optimization pass"), cl::init(true), cl::Hidden)
AMDGPUFrameLowering.h
Interface to describe a layout of a stack frame on a AMDIL target machine.
AMDGPUInstrInfo.h
Contains the definition of a TargetInstrInfo class that is common to all AMD GPUs.
AMDGPUIntrinsicInfo.h
Interface for the AMDGPU Implementation of the Intrinsic Info class.
AMDGPUSubtarget.h
AMDGPU specific subclass of TargetSubtarget.
AMDGPU.h
DataLayout.h
llvm_unreachable
#define llvm_unreachable(msg)
Definition ErrorHandling.h:98
R600ISelLowering.h
R600 DAG Lowering interface definition.
StringExtras.h
StringRef.h
TargetSubtargetInfo.h
AMDGPUGenSubtargetInfo
llvm::AMDGPUFrameLowering
Information about the stack frame layout on the AMDGPU targets.
